description: Podcast episodes to turn into dad-focused guides. Take science/wisdom from popular pods and apply to fatherhood.

topics.title: What Jocko Willink Teaches About Discipline (And Raising Disciplined Kids)
topics.angle: Military discipline principles applied to parenting without being a drill sergeant

topics.title: Tim Ferriss on Fear-Setting for Dads: Make Better Decisions Under Pressure
topics.angle: Use fear-setting framework for parenting decisions, career changes, risks

topics.title: What Huberman Says About Sleep Deprivation (And How New Dads Survive It)
topics.angle: Neuroscience of sleep deprivation + practical protocols for new dads

topics.title: David Goggins on Mental Toughness: Lessons for the Hardest Job You'll Ever Love
topics.angle: Goggins' mental toughness applied to parenting marathons, not sprints

topics.title: What Peter Attia Teaches About Longevity (And Why Dads Need to Hear It)
topics.angle: Live long enough to meet your grandkids - Attia's frameworks for dads

topics.title: Brené Brown on Vulnerability: Why Strong Dads Show Emotion
topics.angle: Vulnerability as strength, modeling emotional intelligence for kids

topics.title: What Rhonda Patrick Says About Nutrition (Dad Fuel Edition)
topics.angle: Science-backed nutrition for exhausted dads who live on coffee and kid snacks

topics.title: Jordan Peterson on Responsibility: The Weight and Gift of Fatherhood
topics.podcast: Jordan Peterson Podcast / Maps of Meaning
topics.angle: Responsibility as meaning - Peterson's philosophy applied to dadhood

topics.title: Huberman on Dopamine: Why Your Kid's Screen Time Matters (And Yours Too)
topics.angle: Dopamine science + practical screen time rules for the whole family

topics.title: What The All-In Podcast Teaches About Building Wealth for Your Kids
topics.angle: Chamath, Sacks, etc. on building generational wealth without being a workaholic

topics.title: Rich Roll on Plant-Based Performance for Dads Who Want Energy
topics.angle: Ultra-endurance lessons for the marathon of parenting

topics.title: What Mark Manson Teaches About Not Giving a F*ck (Parenting Edition)
topics.angle: Choosing your battles, caring about what matters, letting go of parent guilt
search_terms: not giving a fuck as parent
